subcodes.title: Words to some engineers, spoken on 1912-11-03
subcodes.first_line: The Mashriqu'l-Adhkar is circular in shape. It has nine paths, nine gardens, nine pools with fountains and nine gates.
subcodes.first_line_orig: مشرق الاذکار مدور و دائره شکل است ٩ خیابان ٩ باغچه ٩ حوض با فواره های آب و ٩ دروازه در اطراف دارد
subcodes.subjects: @House of Worship [Mashriqu'l-Adhkar], @charitable associations; humanitarian activities, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts
